entry.title: [SGS] Norway’s Erling Haaland had crazy lore before he became a World Cup star
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a jam-packed episode. First, some updates about the World Cup. Then, a deep dive into the lore of Norway’s star player, Erling Haaland, from his Snapchat and YouTube vlogs, to his shopping trips in Dallas for cowboy hats, to his Birkin bags, to his cool soccer-playing girlfriend Isabel Haugseng Johansen.
Then, an update on some compressed flowers to debate: Lions wide receiver Amon-Ra St. Brown and Brooklyn Adams’ engagement, and Falcons wide receiver Drake London and Sofia Rose Gabay’s engagement.
0:00 The gals say hello 1:44 World Cup updates 14:05 Erling Haaland lore 31:28 Fashion mailbag 34:41 Compressed flowers discussion
MERCH: https://the-sports-gossip-show.printify.me/ Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Justin Setterfield/Elsa/Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a jam-packed episode. First, some updates about the World Cup. Then, a deep dive into the lore of Norway’s star player, Erling Haaland, from his Snapchat and YouTube vlogs, to his shopping trips in Dallas for cowboy hats, to his Birkin bags, to his cool soccer-playing girlfriend Isabel Haugseng Johansen.

Then, an update on some compressed flowers to debate: Lions wide receiver Amon-Ra St. Brown and Brooklyn Adams’ engagement, and Falcons wide receiver Drake London and Sofia Rose Gabay’s engagement.

0:00 The gals say hello
1:44 World Cup updates
14:05 Erling Haaland lore
31:28 Fashion mailbag
34:41 Compressed flowers discussion

entry.title: [SGS] World Cup gossip: Cape Verde’s 40-year-old goalie, Iran’s complications, and Tunisia’s new hot coach
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back, reporting from a city still buzzing after the Knicks emerged victorious from the Finals. The boys are being silly on TV, KAT shouted out Jordyn Woods and her lucky bag, the gals decide that Mikal Bridges is the only player allowed to go live, and the parade is set for Thursday.
For all you hockey fans out there: The Carolina Hurricanes took the Stanley Cup with a winning combo of a nerd in the front office and a jock leading the charge on the ice. If you don’t know what that means, listen to the show!
Then, the gals dive into the World Cup, which is already sucking them in with the never-ending intrigue. Cape Verde is the story of the Group Stage so far, with its 40-year-old goalie, Vozinha, who saved the day in a draw against heavily favored Spain. Plus, one of Cape Verde’s players was invited to join the team via LinkedIn. The US beat Paraguay on Friday, and the gals will have a deep dive episode into the USMNT on Thursday. Tunisia fired their manager after the first game and hired a notoriously hot French coach, Herve Renard.
And finally: Some details and info about the Iranian national team’s very strange and complicated situation, and why their best player was left off the roster.
0:00 The gals say hello 0:18 The Knicks are NBA Champions 16:55 Hurricanes win Stanley Cup 24:07 World Cup highlights
MERCH: https://the-sports-gossip-show.printify.me/ Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Jamie Squire/Florencia Tan Jun/William West/Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back, reporting from a city still buzzing after the Knicks emerged victorious from the Finals. The boys are being silly on TV, KAT shouted out Jordyn Woods and her lucky bag, the gals decide that Mikal Bridges is the only player allowed to go live, and the parade is set for Thursday.

For all you hockey fans out there: The Carolina Hurricanes took the Stanley Cup with a winning combo of a nerd in the front office and a jock leading the charge on the ice. If you don’t know what that means, listen to the show!

Then, the gals dive into the World Cup, which is already sucking them in with the never-ending intrigue. Cape Verde is the story of the Group Stage so far, with its 40-year-old goalie, Vozinha, who saved the day in a draw against heavily favored Spain. Plus, one of Cape Verde’s players was invited to join the team via LinkedIn. The US beat Paraguay on Friday, and the gals will have a deep dive episode into the USMNT on Thursday. Tunisia fired their manager after the first game and hired a notoriously hot French coach, Herve Renard.

And finally: Some details and info about the Iranian national team’s very strange and complicated situation, and why their best player was left off the roster.

0:18 The Knicks are NBA Champions

entry.title: [SGS] The ultimate Knicks-Spurs Finals preview with DeAndre Jordan, Monty McCutchen, and Will Reeve
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with Part II of their NBA Finals extravaganza! The Sports Gossip Show was honored to be one of nine podcasts that the NBA invited to their first-ever Podcast Row. This episode is the second of two shows made up of interviews the gals conducted against the backdrop of the Spurs’ arena before Game 1.
First up is DeAndre Jordan, current NBA player, NBA All Star, and Finals champion. He talked about what it takes to be a good teammate, the wildest prank that was ever pulled on him in a locker room, and what it feels like to be traded and then have to play a game immediately with your new team. Then, a conversation with Head of Referee Training & Development, Monty McCutchen, who tells the gals how refs are chosen for the Finals, and much more. Finally, the gals talk to Will Reeve, who is covering the Finals for Good Morning America, about the spirit in New York City when the Knicks are this good.
A huge thank you to the NBA for making this possible!
0:00 The gals are back from the Finals! 3:08 DeAndre Jordan 15:51 Monty McCutchen 30:21 Fashion mailbag 32:16 Will Reeve
MERCH: https://the-sports-gossip-show.printify.me/ Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with Part II of their NBA Finals extravaganza! The Sports Gossip Show was honored to be one of nine podcasts that the NBA invited to their first-ever Podcast Row. This episode is the second of two shows made up of interviews the gals conducted against the backdrop of the Spurs’ arena before Game 1.

First up is DeAndre Jordan, current NBA player, NBA All Star, and Finals champion. He talked about what it takes to be a good teammate, the wildest prank that was ever pulled on him in a locker room, and what it feels like to be traded and then have to play a game immediately with your new team. Then, a conversation with Head of Referee Training & Development, Monty McCutchen, who tells the gals how refs are chosen for the Finals, and much more. Finally, the gals talk to Will Reeve, who is covering the Finals for Good Morning America, about the spirit in New York City when the Knicks are this good.

A huge thank you to the NBA for making this possible!

entry.title: [SGS] Why Morgan Riddle embraces the term WAG
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to welcome Morgan Riddle to the show! The tennis influencer, content creator, co-founder of The 400 Club, and girlfriend of tennis star Taylor Fritz joins the gals for a wide-ranging conversation about where she came from, how she conquered the tennis world, and where she’s going next.
They chat about how Morgan grew up going to hockey games in Minnesota, wore heels to high school, went to Wagner College, and then moved to LA, where she met Taylor. She talks about the first time she went viral, why she quit her job to become a full-time influencer, why she and Taylor deliberately don’t work together, and her relationship with her stylist who she met when she was 13. Morgan also describes the process of choosing what she wears to matches, why she decides to speak out against injustice on social media, and how she’s seen the tennis world dress differently since she started going on tour. She also talks about the worst sporting event experience she ever had and which sports she’d love to go to more often.
Then Morgan talks about The 400 Club, the company of which she’s a co-founder. She wants to give women places that feel safe to watch sports and help brands understand how to reach female fans in ways they haven’t thought of before.
0:00 We’re in a studio! 2:09 Welcome Morgan! 3:31 Morgan’s background 8:39 Tennis’ audience 11:51 Morgan and Taylor’s parallel careers 13:10 Interview with NY Times Fashion 19:00 Vintage picks 21:23 Interaction amongst players 23:18 Brand partnerships 24:42 Authenticity on socials 26:09 The 400 Club 36:45 Raya songs 37:55 Favorite sports gossip story
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to welcome Morgan Riddle to the show! The tennis influencer, content creator, co-founder of The 400 Club, and girlfriend of tennis star Taylor Fritz joins the gals for a wide-ranging conversation about where she came from, how she conquered the tennis world, and where she’s going next.

They chat about how Morgan grew up going to hockey games in Minnesota, wore heels to high school, went to Wagner College, and then moved to LA, where she met Taylor. She talks about the first time she went viral, why she quit her job to become a full-time influencer, why she and Taylor deliberately don’t work together, and her relationship with her stylist who she met when she was 13. Morgan also describes the process of choosing what she wears to matches, why she decides to speak out against injustice on social media, and how she’s seen the tennis world dress differently since she started going on tour. She also talks about the worst sporting event experience she ever had and which sports she’d love to go to more often.

Then Morgan talks about The 400 Club, the company of which she’s a co-founder. She wants to give women places that feel safe to watch sports and help brands understand how to reach female fans in ways they haven’t thought of before.

23:18 Brand partnerships

entry.title: [SGS] Katia Lindor on politics in sports, being married to MLB star Francisco, and rumors about the Mets
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to be joined by Katia Reguero Lindor, the host of “The Unaparent” podcast, and wife of MLB player Francisco, star of the Mets. Katia tells the gals why she feels the responsibility to speak about her left-leaning politics in a traditionally conservative sport, the reality of being married to an athlete, and her upbringing in Puerto Rico. She also talks about parenting, her podcast, “The Unaparent,” and whether the wives and girlfriends of players all actually get along. Plus: The wild rumors she’s heard about herself.
0:00 The gals welcome the shareholders 1:22 Welcome Katia Reguero Lindor to the show! 3:43 Katia's background 6:03 Why speaking up is important 12:45 Katia's trip to the NYC mayoral inauguration 14:41 What inspired Katia to make her podcast 18:35 Finding community through the podcast 20:36 What is it like to be married to an athlete 25:06 Most surprising thing about marrying an athlete 27:17 Francisco and Katia's early days 29:42 Community among partners of athletes 31:13 Katia's best sports gossip moment
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to be joined by Katia Reguero Lindor, the host of “The Unaparent” podcast, and wife of MLB player Francisco, star of the Mets. Katia tells the gals why she feels the responsibility to speak about her left-leaning politics in a traditionally conservative sport, the reality of being married to an athlete, and her upbringing in Puerto Rico. She also talks about parenting, her podcast, “The Unaparent,” and whether the wives and girlfriends of players all actually get along. Plus: The wild rumors she’s heard about herself.

entry.title: [SGS] There are several NFL owners in the Epstein files
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with an episode full of sports gossip and then some not-so-fun Epstein Files-related information at the end.
First, Madison Beer and Chargers QB Justin Herbert were spotted at pre-GRAMMYs party. Indiana’s Fernando Mendoza officially has a LinkedIn sponsorship! Tom Brady had a weird time on his couch with his Instagram stories, and Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton were spotted in Paris together.
Unrivaled set a record for women’s basketball attendance with its huge Philly crowd, and Kylie Kelce gave star Paige Bueckers all the fixins’ for a Shirley Temple after the two talked about the drink on Kelce’s show. On a broadcast, Reggie Miller compared Caitlin Clark to Payton Pritchard — and she was understandably not happy about it. In final basketball news: a Giannis trade!?
It’s looking good for Jordan Chiles receiving her 2024 bronze medal. Singer Benson Boone is playing in the flag football game at the Super Bowl. Robert Kraft will not be in The Hall of Fame this year, his first year of eligibility.
And, finally, a dive into the NFL owners who were mentioned by Jeffrey Epstein — Giants owner Steve Tisch, Patriots owner Robert Kraft, and Jets owner Woody Johnson all come up a fair amount.
0:00 The gals welcome us in 3:55 Grammys recap 6:49 Fernando Mendoza's LinkedIn partnership 8:38 Tom Brady's IG posts 18:20 Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian 21:12 Unrivaled's Philly stop 25:47 Caitlin Clark on NBC 29:12 Giannis trade rumors 31:45 Jordan Chiles bronze update 35:14 Benson Boone and flag football 36:46 NFL owners in the Epstein files
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Michael Reaves/Getty Images and Kevork Djansezian/Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with an episode full of sports gossip and then some not-so-fun Epstein Files-related information at the end.

First, Madison Beer and Chargers QB Justin Herbert were spotted at pre-GRAMMYs party. Indiana’s Fernando Mendoza officially has a LinkedIn sponsorship! Tom Brady had a weird time on his couch with his Instagram stories, and Kim Kardashian and Lewis Hamilton were spotted in Paris together.

Unrivaled set a record for women’s basketball attendance with its huge Philly crowd, and Kylie Kelce gave star Paige Bueckers all the fixins’ for a Shirley Temple after the two talked about the drink on Kelce’s show. On a broadcast, Reggie Miller compared Caitlin Clark to Payton Pritchard — and she was understandably not happy about it. In final basketball news: a Giannis trade!?

It’s looking good for Jordan Chiles receiving her 2024 bronze medal. Singer Benson Boone is playing in the flag football game at the Super Bowl. Robert Kraft will not be in The Hall of Fame this year, his first year of eligibility.

And, finally, a dive into the NFL owners who were mentioned by Jeffrey Epstein — Giants owner Steve Tisch, Patriots owner Robert Kraft, and Jets owner Woody Johnson all come up a fair amount.

0:00 The gals welcome us in
3:55 Grammys recap
6:49 Fernando Mendoza's LinkedIn partnership
8:38 Tom Brady's IG posts
18:20 Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian
21:12 Unrivaled's Philly stop
25:47 Caitlin Clark on NBC
29:12 Giannis trade rumors
31:45 Jordan Chiles bronze update
35:14 Benson Boone and flag football
36:46 NFL owners in the Epstein files

Thumbnail Credit: Michael Reaves/Getty Images and Kevork Djansezian/Getty Images

entry.title: [SGS] The Beckham-Peltz family feud: A complete timeline and analysis
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a complete timeline of the Beckham-Peltz family feud. Brooklyn Beckham sent the internet into a frenzy when he posted many slides on his Instagram story detailing all the reasons he and his wife, Nicola Peltz, no longer want to be associated with his soccer star father, David Beckham, and pop-star-designer mother, Victoria Beckham. The gals dive into the history of the families (including some shocking news about Nicola Peltz’s father) and why this whole thing is a total PR disaster.
0:00 The gals welcome us in 3:26 Beckham family origin story 12:33 Introduction to Brooklyn Beckham 19:03 Nicola Peltz and her family 28:04 Peltz-Beckham engagement and wedding 32:59 Family drama begins 35:29 Brooklyn's Instagram statement 47:38 David Beckham's response
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Gareth Cattermole/Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a complete timeline of the Beckham-Peltz family feud. Brooklyn Beckham sent the internet into a frenzy when he posted many slides on his Instagram story detailing all the reasons he and his wife, Nicola Peltz, no longer want to be associated with his soccer star father, David Beckham, and pop-star-designer mother, Victoria Beckham. The gals dive into the history of the families (including some shocking news about Nicola Peltz’s father) and why this whole thing is a total PR disaster.

entry.title: [SGS] Bill Belichick attended Jordon Hudson’s adult cheerleading competition
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a special edition that they’re calling “Play The Hits,” because this episode has all of SGS’s main characters in one show.
First, Tom Brady wore the same Marty Supreme jacket as Karl-Anthony Towns and ballerina Misty Copeland, so the gals dug into it. They also went to a Marty Supreme screening the other night and had a blast — Timothée Chalamet, come on the pod!
You all knew this was coming: Jordon Hudson competed in an adult cheerleading competition/showcase called Cheer Extreme All Stars in North Carolina. Her boyfriend, UNC head coach Bill Belichick, was there to support her, even as the UNC program sinks even further into the ocean of college football losses.
Giants running back Cam Skattebo, who suffered a season-ending injury in October, went to a taping episode of WWE’s "Monday Night Raw" at Madison Square Garden, and Knicks Star Jalen Brunson had his back. The gals also had to talk more about Aaron Rodgers’ wife Brittani, because Madeline did some digging…and this woman is nowhere to be found.
Then it’s time for Week 12 NFL vibes-based predictions, followed by two MLB weddings. Gavin Lux and Gunnar Henderson each wed their wives this past weekend. Were the flowers compressed? You’ve gotta listen to find out!
0:00-1:05 The gals introduce us to the hits 1:05-7:27 Athletes rep Marty Supreme 7:27-21:59 Jordon Hudson's cheer competition 21:59-34:03 Cam Skattebo on Raw and Aaron Rodgers' mystery wife 34:03-40:45 Week 12 Vibes-based NFL picks 40:45-46:39 MLB wedding updates
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: David Jensen/Getty Images and @jordon/Instagram
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back with a special edition that they’re calling “Play The Hits,” because this episode has all of SGS’s main characters in one show.

First, Tom Brady wore the same Marty Supreme jacket as Karl-Anthony Towns and ballerina Misty Copeland, so the gals dug into it. They also went to a Marty Supreme screening the other night and had a blast — Timothée Chalamet, come on the pod!

You all knew this was coming: Jordon Hudson competed in an adult cheerleading competition/showcase called Cheer Extreme All Stars in North Carolina. Her boyfriend, UNC head coach Bill Belichick, was there to support her, even as the UNC program sinks even further into the ocean of college football losses.

Giants running back Cam Skattebo, who suffered a season-ending injury in October, went to a taping episode of WWE’s "Monday Night Raw" at Madison Square Garden, and Knicks Star Jalen Brunson had his back. The gals also had to talk more about Aaron Rodgers’ wife Brittani, because Madeline did some digging…and this woman is nowhere to be found.

Then it’s time for Week 12 NFL vibes-based predictions, followed by two MLB weddings. Gavin Lux and Gunnar Henderson each wed their wives this past weekend. Were the flowers compressed? You’ve gotta listen to find out!

1:05-7:27 Athletes rep Marty Supreme
7:27-21:59 Jordon Hudson's cheer competition

entry.title: [SGS] A deep dive into the Bill Belichick UNC trainwreck
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are doing things a little differently this week — instead of the normal Tuesday episode, they’re bringing you a special deep dive today into the UNC football program coached by Bill Belichick.
Lots of reporting came out last week about the problems within the program, including a report from The Athletic, which college football reporter and UNC alum Grace Raynor contributed to.
The gals are thrilled to welcome Grace onto the show to talk about the rumors that Belichick will leave the program, the strange graphic the university put out, the cancelled Hulu documentary, the Jordon Hudson of it all, the arrogance of general manager Mike Lombardi, the vibes at UNC games, and why the name of Bill Belichick’s boat might be to blame for all of this.
The gals will be back with a regular gossip rundown episode on Thursday!
0:00-8:42 Previewing today’s episode 8:42-11:24 Welcome to the show, Grace Raynor 11:24-16:09 UNC-Belichick hiring process 16:09-23:20 Reactions to disastrous season 23:20-26:29 UNC Football GM Mike Lombardi 26:29-30:06 Jordon Hudson 30:06-33:30 Pre-season hype 33:30-37:38 Can the season be repaired? 37:38-45:11 Best sports gossip item of all-time 45:11-46:38 Grace Raynor interview recap
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail photo credit: David Jensen / Getty Images Sport / via Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are doing things a little differently this week — instead of the normal Tuesday episode, they’re bringing you a special deep dive today into the UNC football program coached by Bill Belichick.

Lots of reporting came out last week about the problems within the program, including a report from The Athletic, which college football reporter and UNC alum Grace Raynor contributed to.

The gals are thrilled to welcome Grace onto the show to talk about the rumors that Belichick will leave the program, the strange graphic the university put out, the cancelled Hulu documentary, the Jordon Hudson of it all, the arrogance of general manager Mike Lombardi, the vibes at UNC games, and why the name of Bill Belichick’s boat might be to blame for all of this.

The gals will be back with a regular gossip rundown episode on Thursday!

0:00-8:42 Previewing today’s episode
8:42-11:24 Welcome to the show, Grace Raynor
11:24-16:09 UNC-Belichick hiring process
16:09-23:20 Reactions to disastrous season
23:20-26:29 UNC Football GM Mike Lombardi
26:29-30:06 Jordon Hudson
30:06-33:30 Pre-season hype
33:30-37:38 Can the season be repaired?
37:38-45:11 Best sports gossip item of all-time
45:11-46:38 Grace Raynor interview recap

entry.title: [SGS] Picking NFL Week 3 winners based only on vibes
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte look at the Week 3 slate of NFL games and choose their winners using only the vibes of the teams. The gals went 12/16 last week — so don’t overthink it, folks!
0:00-5:13 NFL Week 3 vibes-based picks 5:13-6:05 Miami Dolphins @ Buffalo Bills 6:05-7:06 Green Bay Packers @ Cleveland Browns 7:06-10:22 Indianapolis Colts @ Tennessee Titans 10:22-11:02 Cincinnati Bengals @ Minnesota Vikings 11:02-11:40 Pittsburgh Steelers @ New England Patriots 11:40-13:25 Los Angeles Rams @ Philadelphia Eagles 13:25-15:33 New York Jets @ Tampa Bay Buccaneers 15:33-16:16 Las Vegas Raiders @ Washington Commanders 16:16-17:06 Atlanta Falcons @ Carolina Panthers 17:06-19:14 Houston Texans @ Jacksonville Jaguars 19:14-19:58 Denver Broncos @ Los Angeles Chargers 19:58-20:49 New Orleans Saints @ Seattle Seahawks 20:49-22:32 Dallas Cowboys @ Chicago Bears 22:32-23:00 Arizona Cardinals @ San Francisco 49ers 23:00-24:53 Kansas City Chiefs @ New York Giants 24:53-28:10 Detroit Lions @ Baltimore Ravens

entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte look at the Week 3 slate of NFL games and choose their winners using only the vibes of the teams. The gals went 12/16 last week — so don’t overthink it, folks!

6:05-7:06 Green Bay Packers @ Cleveland Browns

entry.title: [SGS] The NFL has a documentary industrial complex
entry.summary:
There are a ton (well, at least three) of NFL documentaries out this fall, and Madeline and Charlotte watched them so you don’t have to. And if you watched them too, that’s great! It’s like a book club, but for docs!
Join SGS for another deep dive episode analyzing two Netflix series, “America’s Team: The Cowboy and His Gamblers” and “Quarterback,” plus HBO’s “Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Buffalo Bills.”
Come along for the conversation about what makes a documentary, what gets excluded, whether access wins out over truth these days, and what the gals learned after filling their brains with hours of NFL-based content.
0:00-22:56 America’s Team: Cowboy and His Gamblers 22:56-24:50 Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the Buffalo Bills 24:50-33:59 The legend of Jerry Jones 33:59-37:14 Quarterback 37:14-39:02 Influence of The Last Dance 39:02-47:05 The NFL documentary industrial complex
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Amy Sussman / Getty Images Sports / via Getty Images
entry.content:
There are a ton (well, at least three) of NFL documentaries out this fall, and Madeline and Charlotte watched them so you don’t have to. And if you watched them too, that’s great! It’s like a book club, but for docs!

Join SGS for another deep dive episode analyzing two Netflix series, “America’s Team: The Cowboy and His Gamblers” and “Quarterback,” plus HBO’s “Hard Knocks: Training Camp With the Buffalo Bills.”

Come along for the conversation about what makes a documentary, what gets excluded, whether access wins out over truth these days, and what the gals learned after filling their brains with hours of NFL-based content.

0:00-22:56 America’s Team: Cowboy and His Gamblers
22:56-24:50 Hard Knocks: Training Camp with the Buffalo Bills
24:50-33:59 The legend of Jerry Jones
33:59-37:14 Quarterback
37:14-39:02 Influence of The Last Dance
39:02-47:05 The NFL documentary industrial complex

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬

entry.title: [SGS] Jordon Hudson pulls out of Dancing with the Stars, Week 2 NFL vibes pick results
entry.summary:
Well, folks, Madeline and Charlotte have a doozy of an episode for you today!
Lots of juicy stuff — but first, they check in on their Week 2 NFL vibes-based picks. Not to brag, but they really crushed it this week.
Then, an update on the compressed flowers at Green Bay Packers’ quarterback Jordan Love’s wedding.
In not-so-great news, Joe Burrow needs surgery on his toe and the Kansas City Chiefs are falling apart.
Also, Taylor Swift appeared to sneak into the Chiefs’ stadium?
The WNBA’s StudBudz are in Vogue.
The Playoffs have started, and coaches are *not* happy with the officiating.
The gals discuss the alleged love triangle between tennis stars Jannick Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, and Brooks Nader — is it real, or is Nader just promoting her new reality show?
Jordon Hudson was going to appear on Dancing with the Stars, but now she isn’t, and it’s not totally surprising.
Snowboarder Shaun White and actress Nina Dobrev broke off their engagement and SGS coins the term “WAG-washing.”
Plus, an update to the Shohei Ohtani lawsuit that the gals don’t understand.
0:00-7:49 Week 2 vibes-based NFL picks results 7:49-11:27 Jordan Love’s wedding 11:27-14:08 Joe Burrow’s turf toe 14:08-15:43 Colts owner takes notes on sidelines 15:43-22:43 The Kansas City Chiefs are falling apart 22:43-25:56 The Stud Budz were in Vogue 25:56-30:57 WNBA Playoffs have begun 30:57-37:13 Carlos Alcaraz & Jannik Sinner love triangle 37:13-43:25 Shaun White & Nine Dobrev broke off their engagement 43:25-50:17 Jordon Hudson / Dancing with the Stars rumors 50:17-53:24 What’s up with that?
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Tim Clayton / Getty Images Sport / via Getty Images
entry.content:
Well, folks, Madeline and Charlotte have a doozy of an episode for you today!

Lots of juicy stuff — but first, they check in on their Week 2 NFL vibes-based picks. Not to brag, but they really crushed it this week.

Then, an update on the compressed flowers at Green Bay Packers’ quarterback Jordan Love’s wedding.

In not-so-great news, Joe Burrow needs surgery on his toe and the Kansas City Chiefs are falling apart.

Also, Taylor Swift appeared to sneak into the Chiefs’ stadium?

The WNBA’s StudBudz are in Vogue.

The Playoffs have started, and coaches are *not* happy with the officiating.

The gals discuss the alleged love triangle between tennis stars Jannick Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, and Brooks Nader — is it real, or is Nader just promoting her new reality show?

Jordon Hudson was going to appear on Dancing with the Stars, but now she isn’t, and it’s not totally surprising.

Snowboarder Shaun White and actress Nina Dobrev broke off their engagement and SGS coins the term “WAG-washing.”

Plus, an update to the Shohei Ohtani lawsuit that the gals don’t understand.

0:00-7:49 Week 2 vibes-based NFL picks results
7:49-11:27 Jordan Love’s wedding
11:27-14:08 Joe Burrow’s turf toe
14:08-15:43 Colts owner takes notes on sidelines
15:43-22:43 The Kansas City Chiefs are falling apart
22:43-25:56 The Stud Budz were in Vogue
25:56-30:57 WNBA Playoffs have begun
30:57-37:13 Carlos Alcaraz & Jannik Sinner love triangle
37:13-43:25 Shaun White & Nine Dobrev broke off their engagement
43:25-50:17 Jordon Hudson / Dancing with the Stars rumors
50:17-53:24 What’s up with that?

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip
Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow

entry.title: [SGS] Picking NFL Week 1 winners based on vibes
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are back, and so is the NFL!! The gals talk about vibes a lot on The Sports Gossip Show, so they decided to put their money where their mouths are and pick the winner of the Week 1 match-ups based solely on how they feel about the teams (and a few facts, but whatever).
How are the vibes of your team? Watch to find out.
Disclaimer: The gals *did* forget about the Broncos and the Titans. Apologies. They’ll make it up to them next week.
0:00-11:53 Madeline’s new favorite team 11:53-15:28 Dallas Cowboys @ Philadelphia Eagles 15:28-18:13 Kansas City Chiefs @ Los Angeles Chargers 18:13-23:06 Tampa Bay Buccaneers @ Atlanta Falcons 23:06-25:59 Cincinnati Bengals @ Cleveland Browns 25:59-27:07 Miami Dolphins @ Indianapolis Colts 27:07-29:45 Las Vegas Raiders @ New England Patriots 29:45-31:53 Arizona Cardinals @ New Orleans Saints 31:53-35:28 Pittsburgh Steelers @ New York Jets 35:28-36:20 New York Giants @ Washington Commanders 36:20-37:50 Carolina Panthers @ Jacksonville Jaguars 37:50-38:12 San Francisco 49ers @ Seattle Seahawks 38:12-39:28 Detroit Lions @ Green Bay Packers 39:38-42:30 Houston Texans @ Los Angeles Rams 42:30-44:50 Baltimore Ravens @ Buffalo Bills 44:50-48:19 Minnesota Vikings @ Chicago Bears 48:19-49:27 Madeline plugs the show’s socials…a few times
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credit: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Kevin Sabitus / Getty Sports / via Getty Images
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are back, and so is the NFL!! The gals talk about vibes a lot on The Sports Gossip Show, so they decided to put their money where their mouths are and pick the winner of the Week 1 match-ups based solely on how they feel about the teams (and a few facts, but whatever).

How are the vibes of your team? Watch to find out.

Disclaimer: The gals *did* forget about the Broncos and the Titans. Apologies. They’ll make it up to them next week.

0:00-11:53 Madeline’s new favorite team

entry.title: [SGS] Tennis love triangles and US Open preview with Catherine Whitaker
entry.summary:
0:00-3:22 Welcome to the show, Catherine Whitaker 3:22-10:57 Carlos Alcaraz vs. Jannik Sinner 10:57-16:50 Iga Świątek is winning and loves strawberry pasta 16:50-23:30 Naomi Osaka’s career 23:30-26:21 Jannik Sinner’s doping scandal 26:21-38:54 The long tennis season 38:54-41:21 Venus Williams’ return 41:21-43:41 Game, Set, Matchmaker 43:41-50:52 Tennis love triangles
Catherine Whitaker is one of the co-hosts of The Tennis Podcast, another great show on The Athletic Podcast Network, and Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to welcome her to the Sports Gossip Show ahead of this year’s US Open. The tennis tea has never been hotter!
The gals ask Catherine everything you all want to know about this year’s upcoming American Grand Slam.
She talks about the length of the tennis season and whether anything can be done about it, Jannick Sinner’s doping ban, why Iga Świątek is no-drama, how Naomi Osaka is her own fiercest competition, and hook-up culture on the tour.
Things get juicy when Catherine tells the gals about the love triangle that tennis fans desperately want to believe in between Emma Raducanu, Carlos Alcaraz, and Jack Draper.
She also dishes about a rumored love triangle from years ago involving Serena Williams and Maria Sharapova.
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬ Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/ Photo Credits: Getty Images Thumbnail Credit: Elsa / Staff/ Getty Images Sport via Getty Images
entry.content:
0:00-3:22 Welcome to the show, Catherine Whitaker
3:22-10:57 Carlos Alcaraz vs. Jannik Sinner
10:57-16:50 Iga Świątek is winning and loves strawberry pasta
16:50-23:30 Naomi Osaka’s career
23:30-26:21 Jannik Sinner’s doping scandal
26:21-38:54 The long tennis season
38:54-41:21 Venus Williams’ return
41:21-43:41 Game, Set, Matchmaker
43:41-50:52 Tennis love triangles

Catherine Whitaker is one of the co-hosts of The Tennis Podcast, another great show on The Athletic Podcast Network, and Madeline and Charlotte are thrilled to welcome her to the Sports Gossip Show ahead of this year’s US Open. The tennis tea has never been hotter!

The gals ask Catherine everything you all want to know about this year’s upcoming American Grand Slam.

She talks about the length of the tennis season and whether anything can be done about it, Jannick Sinner’s doping ban, why Iga Świątek is no-drama, how Naomi Osaka is her own fiercest competition, and hook-up culture on the tour.

Things get juicy when Catherine tells the gals about the love triangle that tennis fans desperately want to believe in between Emma Raducanu, Carlos Alcaraz, and Jack Draper.

She also dishes about a rumored love triangle from years ago involving Serena Williams and Maria Sharapova.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow‬
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossip
Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow
Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR
Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/
Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/
Photo Credits: Getty Images
Thumbnail Credit: Elsa / Staff/ Getty Images Sport via Getty Images

entry.title: [SGS] Aaron Rodgers has a job, French Open winners, the Knicks go clubbing, and US men's soccer drama
entry.summary:
00:00-5:08: Hey Ben Stiller 5:08-7:47: A few corrections about Al Palagonia 7:47-12:13 NBA and NHL Finals updates 12:13-17:26: Hailee Steinfeld/Larry David update 17:26-26:11 Coco Gauff won the US Open 26:11-35:46 Alcaraz and Sinner’s insanely long match 35:46-40:46 Aaron Rodgers is employed 40:46-45:16 Knicks fired Tom Thibodeau and player updates 45:16-52:59 US soccer beef 52:59-54:55 The Cowboys went dancing
Madeline and Charlotte have a bone to pick with Ben Stiller: he presented Best Play at the Tony Awards and joked that that isn’t an overlap between people who watch the Tonys and like sports — but we are the place for that overlap, Ben!!!
Secondly, a few corrections about Spike Lee and his best friend Al Palagonia.
And an update about Hailee Steinfeld’s dad.
Coco Gauff took home her first French Open win on Saturday, beating Aryna Sabalenka. Sabalenka said some stuff that she had to walk back at her press conference, and Coco’s dad is very relatable because he’s too stressed to watch his daughter.
Carlos Alcaraz continued Rafa Nadal’s tradition of winning on clay, beating Janick Sinner in one of the longest matches ever. Also, some info about Alcaraz’s barber, and Skinner recently announced he’s single and met the pope.
An Aaron Rodgers update: He signed with the Steelers, and he might be married (of course news broke after the gals recorded confirming that he’s married). The Knicks fired Tom Thibodeau, and the players went clubbing.
Madeline details some drama between the US Men’s National Team drama starring commentator and former player Landon Donovan and USMNT star Christian Pulisic.
And, finally, the Dallas Cowboys went dancing.
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/
entry.content:
00:00-5:08: Hey Ben Stiller
5:08-7:47: A few corrections about Al Palagonia
7:47-12:13 NBA and NHL Finals updates
12:13-17:26: Hailee Steinfeld/Larry David update
17:26-26:11 Coco Gauff won the US Open
26:11-35:46 Alcaraz and Sinner’s insanely long match
35:46-40:46 Aaron Rodgers is employed
40:46-45:16 Knicks fired Tom Thibodeau and player updates
45:16-52:59 US soccer beef
52:59-54:55 The Cowboys went dancing

Madeline and Charlotte have a bone to pick with Ben Stiller: he presented Best Play at the Tony Awards and joked that that isn’t an overlap between people who watch the Tonys and like sports — but we are the place for that overlap, Ben!!!

Secondly, a few corrections about Spike Lee and his best friend Al Palagonia.

And an update about Hailee Steinfeld’s dad.

Coco Gauff took home her first French Open win on Saturday, beating Aryna Sabalenka. Sabalenka said some stuff that she had to walk back at her press conference, and Coco’s dad is very relatable because he’s too stressed to watch his daughter.

Carlos Alcaraz continued Rafa Nadal’s tradition of winning on clay, beating Janick Sinner in one of the longest matches ever. Also, some info about Alcaraz’s barber, and Skinner recently announced he’s single and met the pope.

An Aaron Rodgers update: He signed with the Steelers, and he might be married (of course news broke after the gals recorded confirming that he’s married). The Knicks fired Tom Thibodeau, and the players went clubbing.

Madeline details some drama between the US Men’s National Team drama starring commentator and former player Landon Donovan and USMNT star Christian Pulisic.

And, finally, the Dallas Cowboys went dancing.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: ‪@SportsGossipShow
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow
Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow
Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR
Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/
Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/

entry.title: [SGS] ESPN’s Elle Duncan on the WNBA draft, imposter syndrome, and fav sports gossip ever
entry.summary:
00:00 Intro 1:12 The rise of women's basketball 4:37 Surprises from the 2025 WNBA draft 8:52 The "social media" draft 15:12 The impact of Unrivaled on women's basketball 18:41 Why Elle felt imposter syndrome 27:45 Elle's favorite sports gossip of all time 29:53 Vibe check!
Madeline and Charlotte could not be more thrilled to have ESPN's Elle Duncan on the show! Elle is the anchor of the 6 p.m. SportsCenter, co-host of her YouTube show and podcast “The Elle Duncan Show,” women’s college basketball host for ESPN’s College GameDay, and host of WNBA Countdown’s studio coverage throughout the WNBA season with Chiney Ogwumike and Andraya Carter.
Elle just wrapped up a very busy women’s college basketball season and is heading into the WNBA season, so who better to talk about the draft and look ahead?
Elle talks about why this year’s ratings can't be compared to last year’s and why there’s such exponential growth in women’s basketball.
She tells Madeline and Charlotte whether anything in this year’s draft shocked her, why she loves Hailey Van Lith’s story, why she’s intrigued to see how Paige Bueckers and Arike Ogunbowale play together in Dallas, why the women’s college game seems more popular than the men’s these days, and why this year’s WNBA draft was “the social media draft.”
Elle also tells the gals what it felt like to start working in women’s sports, how welcoming the women’s basketball world has been, and why hockey fans are the most intense.
She reveals her favorite sports gossip moment of all time (when Tony Parker cheated on Eva Longoria with his teammate’s wife).
And, finally, the show ends with Elle’s signature vibe check, but she's the one who has to answer the questions!
Subscribe to our YouTube channel: @SportsGossipShow Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/
entry.content:
00:00 Intro
1:12 The rise of women's basketball
4:37 Surprises from the 2025 WNBA draft
8:52 The "social media" draft
15:12 The impact of Unrivaled on women's basketball
18:41 Why Elle felt imposter syndrome
27:45 Elle's favorite sports gossip of all time
29:53 Vibe check!

Madeline and Charlotte could not be more thrilled to have ESPN's Elle Duncan on the show! Elle is the anchor of the 6 p.m. SportsCenter, co-host of her YouTube show and podcast “The Elle Duncan Show,” women’s college basketball host for ESPN’s College GameDay, and host of WNBA Countdown’s studio coverage throughout the WNBA season with Chiney Ogwumike and Andraya Carter.

Elle just wrapped up a very busy women’s college basketball season and is heading into the WNBA season, so who better to talk about the draft and look ahead?

Elle talks about why this year’s ratings can't be compared to last year’s and why there’s such exponential growth in women’s basketball.

She tells Madeline and Charlotte whether anything in this year’s draft shocked her, why she loves Hailey Van Lith’s story, why she’s intrigued to see how Paige Bueckers and Arike Ogunbowale play together in Dallas, why the women’s college game seems more popular than the men’s these days, and why this year’s WNBA draft was “the social media draft.”

Elle also tells the gals what it felt like to start working in women’s sports, how welcoming the women’s basketball world has been, and why hockey fans are the most intense.

She reveals her favorite sports gossip moment of all time (when Tony Parker cheated on Eva Longoria with his teammate’s wife).

And, finally, the show ends with Elle’s signature vibe check, but she's the one who has to answer the questions!

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: @SportsGossipShow
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow
Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/sportsgossipshow
Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR
Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/
Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/

entry.title: [SGS] Let’s check in on LeBron James!
entry.summary:
0:44 Stephen A Smith Instagram post 3:00 Mattel is making a LeBron James Barbie 5:02 Savanah James’ new skincare line 10:24 Charlotte issues an apology
The gals had too much to talk about this week, and LeBron James has been up to a lot, so they put together a quick special episode on the NBA star for your Thursday.
First off, a quick update to the prolonged fight between LeBron and ESPN talking head Stephen A Smith (for a full primer, watch this episode of SGS).
It turns out that Mattel is making a LeBron James Barbie? And the gals….love it? Someone send them a doll ASAP.
In other commercial news, Savannah James, LeBron’s wife, is starting a high end skin care brand. And resident skincare expert Madeline tells you everything you need to know about it.
Finally, the gals talk about actual basketball, and Charlotte issues an apology to the Lakers.
Subscribe to our YouTube channel:‪ ‪@SportsGossipShow Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow/# Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/
entry.content:
0:44 Stephen A Smith Instagram post
3:00 Mattel is making a LeBron James Barbie
5:02 Savanah James’ new skincare line
10:24 Charlotte issues an apology

The gals had too much to talk about this week, and LeBron James has been up to a lot, so they put together a quick special episode on the NBA star for your Thursday.

First off, a quick update to the prolonged fight between LeBron and ESPN talking head Stephen A Smith (for a full primer, watch this episode of SGS).

It turns out that Mattel is making a LeBron James Barbie? And the gals….love it? Someone send them a doll ASAP.

In other commercial news, Savannah James, LeBron’s wife, is starting a high end skin care brand. And resident skincare expert Madeline tells you everything you need to know about it.

Finally, the gals talk about actual basketball, and Charlotte issues an apology to the Lakers.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel:‪ ‪@SportsGossipShow
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow/#  
Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sportsgossipshow 
Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR 
Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ 
Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/

entry.title: [SGS] Kelsey McKinney on the importance of sports gossip
entry.summary:
Madeline and Charlotte are very excited to welcome Kelsey McKinney to the show!
Kelsey is the foremost expert on gossip, having written The New York Times and USA Today bestseller You Didn’t Hear This From Me: (Mostly) True Notes on Gossip, a co-owner and features writer at Defector, and one of the co-creators of the hit podcast Normal Gossip.
Kelsey is also a die-hard Philadelphia sports fan and sports gossip enthusiast. She joins the show to talk about her great new book, and the importance of sports gossip.
0:00 Welcome Kelsey to The Sports Gossip Show! 1:03 Parasocial nature of celebrity gossip 3:36 Sports documentaries 5:18 Gabe Kapler 7:01: Sports gambling and vibes 9:19: Philly sports gossip 13:35 Favorite Philly sports lore 17:33: Normal Gossip and sports 18:10: Competitive sports drama 23:22 Rules of gossip 25:51 Favorite sports gossip of all time
She helps the gals answer some very important questions, such as:
Why does it matter how we talk about sports?
Are sports statistics actually just vibes?
Is gossip actually the best way to bet on sports?
Should you adopt the team of the city you live in if you didn’t grow up there?
Are the Phillies cursed because they’re playing the wrong version of a Robyn song?
Why do recreational and youth sports breed so much gossip?
How is gossip about in-groups and out-groups?
Is gossiping about one person actually the best way to make a sports team successful?
Are there rules to gossip?
The episode ends with Kelsey telling the gals the most amazing pieces of gossip related to a Super Bowl they’ve ever heard.
Subscribe to our YouTube channel:‪ ‪@SportsGossipShow Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sportsgossipshow/# Follow on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sportsgossipshow Listen on Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-sports-gossip-show/id1769969236 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5tvzu1FzPdn8orKIv1OBQR Subscribe to our Substack: https://sportsgossipshow.substack.com/ Partner with us: https://www.sportsgossipshow.com/
entry.content:
Madeline and Charlotte are very excited to welcome Kelsey McKinney to the show!

Kelsey is the foremost expert on gossip, having written The New York Times and USA Today bestseller You Didn’t Hear This From Me: (Mostly) True Notes on Gossip, a co-owner and features writer at Defector, and one of the co-creators of the hit podcast Normal Gossip.

Kelsey is also a die-hard Philadelphia sports fan and sports gossip enthusiast. She joins the show to talk about her great new book, and the importance of sports gossip.

0:00 Welcome Kelsey to The Sports Gossip Show!
1:03 Parasocial nature of celebrity gossip
3:36 Sports documentaries
5:18 Gabe Kapler
7:01: Sports gambling and vibes
9:19: Philly sports gossip
13:35 Favorite Philly sports lore
17:33: Normal Gossip and sports
18:10: Competitive sports drama
23:22 Rules of gossip
25:51 Favorite sports gossip of all time

She helps the gals answer some very important questions, such as:

Why does it matter how we talk about sports?

Are sports statistics actually just vibes?

Is gossip actually the best way to bet on sports?

Should you adopt the team of the city you live in if you didn’t grow up there?

Are the Phillies cursed because they’re playing the wrong version of a Robyn song?

Why do recreational and youth sports breed so much gossip?

How is gossip about in-groups and out-groups?

Is gossiping about one person actually the best way to make a sports team successful?

Are there rules to gossip?

The episode ends with Kelsey telling the gals the most amazing pieces of gossip related to a Super Bowl they’ve ever heard.
